reviews.review_description:
I've been experiencing some issues with the Arloopa XR app on my Meta Quest 3. The app sometimes freezes, and I have to exit and re-enter multiple times. Occasionally, it even gets stuck and won't open at all.

However, I have to say that the app is truly amazing and exactly what I was looking for. It’s impressive, and I really enjoy using it. I hope the developers can fix the small
